productDisplayName: Puma Men's Ikonis White Black Red Shoe
description: Get used to superior comfort and performance during runs with these Cell Ikonis 2 shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you to help you run better and look great doing it. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays to provide a high degree of breathability and stability Formstripe and cat logo on the sides for added style and comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit OthoLite sockliner for enhanced comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Midsole EVA midsole for extra cushioning and improved shock absorption Outsole ArchTec to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Long-lasting CELL unit in heel for improved shock absorption EverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole for enhanced durability in high-wear areas Aggressive pattern with flex grooves for more flexibility to the feet
